AllowPlayersPatOthers.Name: Allow players to pat other tokens
AllowPlayersPatOthers.Hint: When enabled, non-GM users can pat tokens they do not own, subject to hostile token restrictions.

AllowPatHostile.Name: Allow patting hostile tokens
AllowPatHostile.Hint: When disabled, non-GM users cannot pat tokens with hostile disposition.

ShowChatMessage.Name: Show chat messages
ShowChatMessage.Hint: Send a small localized chat card whenever someone uses Pat Pat.

CooldownSeconds.Name: Cooldown seconds
CooldownSeconds.Hint: Per-user, per-target cooldown in seconds. Set to 0 to disable cooldowns.

AnimationIntensity.Name: Default pat intensity
AnimationIntensity.Hint: The default intensity selected when opening the Pat Pat dialog.

Pat.Title: Choose Pat Intensity
Pat.MessageHint: Shown above the token and in chat. Up to {max} characters; leave blank to use the default.

Calibration.Title: Calibrate Pat Position
Calibration.Hint: Offsets are screen pixels relative to the token's top-center point. Suggested range: -300 to 300.

Notifications.CalibrationRequested: Pat position save requested from an active GM.

Warnings.Cooldown: Pat Pat is on cooldown for this token. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
Warnings.NoPermission: You do not have permission to pat this token.
Warnings.HostileNotAllowed: Hostile tokens cannot be patted with the current settings.
Warnings.NoToken: No valid target token was found.
Warnings.NoCalibrationPermission: You cannot save a pat position for this token right now.
Warnings.Generic: Pat Pat Party could not complete that interaction.
